title: Harness Bizarreness
description: Server-side mod adding faster ghast harnesses
body:
# Harness Bizarreness
This is a tiny server-side Fabric mod that adds a craftable ugprade to Ghast Harnesses, multiplying their speed by 1.5x.

Additionally, happy ghasts are by default slightly faster and also attempt to run away from you far less when you dismount.

Vanilla clients can join with this mod installed. Note that enhanced harnesses don't look any different from vanilla ones when equipped on the ghast.

The recipe for the harnesses:

![The recipe for the harness](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28c62e0b47aea582a518f710da06672a98f4b9ac.png)

This mod also works when installed on the local server (that is, singleplayer).

Powered by [Polymer](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymer).
